arts.ttl: Man Utd rival Man City for Pep Guardiola's top target
arts.sum: FootballTransfers exclusively revealed in January that Costa has emerged as one of the priority targets for Man City, who are expected to part ways with Ederson this summer. However, Man City are far from the only club interested in adding an elite goalkeeper this summer, and Man Utd have also taken a keen interest in Costa, according to Correio da Manha .

arts.ttl: Aston Villa star tipped for Real Madrid move, feeling he should aim for ‘world top’
arts.sum: Youri Tielemans has been one of the best players of the season for Aston Villa. The midfielder has played 33 games in the Premier League, racking up seven assists and scoring two goals. He also has two goals in the UEFA Champions League. arts.ttl: Aston Villa handed transfer boost as UEFA reveal £200m payment
arts.sum: Aston Villa have been paid almost £1.6m by UEFA for releasing their players to compete in national team competitions, adding to their coffers ahead of the opening of the summer transfer window. UEFA have revealed over 900 clubs have received payments after their players took part in national team competitions

arts.sum: Marcus Rashford looks to have no future at Man United, and it is inevitable that he will depart his boyhood club on a permanent basis.
